pageTitle: cyAsk to adjourn (delay) the court hearing
caption: cyMake an application
heading: cyAsk to adjourn (delay) the court hearing
paragraph1: cyYou can ask the court to adjourn (delay) the court hearing (move it to a later date or time). This means that you can ask to change the date and time when the hearing is due to take place.
paragraph2: cyYou will need to show that you have a good reason to delay the hearing, and you may not be successful.
ifYouCanPayTheCourtFee: cyif you can pay the court fee, or if you need help with fees (help to pay court fees)
whyYouAreAskingTheCourt: cywhy you are asking the court to delay the hearing
whenProposingMovingTo: cywhen you are proposing the hearing be moved to (if applicable)
youMayNeedToProvideEvidence: cyYou may need to provide some evidence to the court.
beforeYouStart: cyBefore you start: Make sure that you have all of the evidence you need to apply.
onceYouStart: cyOnce you start your application, you cannot save your progress as a draft.
weWillNotSaveYourAnswers: cyThis means that if you leave your application before submitting, we will not save your answers so that you can return to them later.
assessedOnUrgencyBasis: cyYour application will be assessed on an urgency basis and will be considered by a judge before the hearing date.
freeIfAtLeast14DaysAway: cyIt’s free to apply if your court hearing is at least 14 days away.
ifHearingSoonerNeedToPay: cyIf your court hearing is sooner, you will need to pay {{standardFee, currency(currency: GBP; trailingZeroDisplay: stripIfInteger)}}.
feeIncreasesIf: cyThe fee will increase to {{maxFee, currency(currency: GBP; trailingZeroDisplay: stripIfInteger)}} if:
youHaveAlreadyToldTheOtherParty: cyyou have already told the other party that you are making this application, and
theyDidNotAgreeToIt: cythey did not agree to it (this means that they have objected to it)
youWillSeeTheFinalApplicationFee: cyYou’ll see the final application fee before you pay.
ifYouAreWorriedAboutPayingFees: cyIf you are worried about paying fees
youMayBeEligibleForHWF: cyYou may be eligible to apply for help with fees (GOV.UK, opens in a new tab). We will ask you if you want to do this when you apply.
ifPreferToRespondByPost: cyIf you’d prefer to respond by post:
sendTheCompletedFormToTheCourt: cysend the completed form to the court
